channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lots of rubbish fly tipped, 10th May
item.description:
Fly tipping which is growing daily it's also blocking the foot path and its a really bad look for the area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Pegley Gardens, Chinbrook, Grove Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unclaimed recycling bins, 10th May
item.description:
Two recycling bins that flew down street in wind and nobody has claimed them. Also we need a litter pick in Cherry Orchard Close up to Blacksmiths Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-17, Cherry Orchard Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light for Seven Sisters traffic now facing up Stroud Green Rd. Just seen car drive across SS Rd narrowly avoiding crash., 10th May
item.description:
Very dangerous, both green and red show at same time, because Seven Sisters lights have been hit and now face up Stroud Green Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 284, Seven Sisters Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Home appliance dumped on the bushes, 10th May
item.description:
Been there for a while now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillbrow Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is the third time I’ve reported it recently lots of rubbish along Sandy Lane, 10th May
item.description:
This is the third time I’ve reported it in 10 days the rubbish along Sandylane emanatesS from vehicles visiting Selco and Rexel There is a clue to where this rubbish is coming from because after the bridge the reminder of Sandy line is mostly free of rubbish once again all this rubbish comes from vehicles visiting Rexel and Selco
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and rubbish everyday, 10th May
item.description:
Get this sorted!!! happens everday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2a dyne road, 10th May
item.description:
Large pink sofa fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

4 black bags of flytipped rubbish, spilling onto the pavement by the Footscray Rugby Club bus stop
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham

item.title: Trolley dumped, 10th May
item.description:

item.title: Fly-tiping on Jacaranda Grove - second location, 10th May
item.description:
Fly-tiping on Jacaranda Grove - second location

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily issue with fly tipping underneath this tree, 10th May
item.description:
Please can the law be enforced to stop the continual fly tipping underneath this tree? There are bags dumped here every day. It is appalling.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular flytipping and rubbish dumped, 10th May
item.description:
The entrance to our building regularly sees furniture and rubbish bags dumped at the bottom. This is cleared by Peabody but people return with furniture the following day. It’s becoming a public health hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatham Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on Jacaranda Grove, 10th May
item.description:
Fly-tipping been there around 1 week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish from kids party and bbq all left in park, 10th May
item.description:
People should be fined for this! Looks like a children’s party with all the rubbish left behind blowing around

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrowgate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
